calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Fairfax County Public Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Fairfax County Public Schools is Monday, August 25, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Fairfax County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Fairfax County Public Schools runs Mar 30, 2026–Apr 3, 2026, 5 days.

yearNumbers.label: Rosh Hashanah
yearNumbers.detail: School closed district-wide for Rosh Hashanah, one of two Jewish High Holidays observed as full holidays.

yearNumbers.label: Yom Kippur
yearNumbers.detail: School closed district-wide for Yom Kippur, observed consistently as a full holiday in FCPS.

calendarNotes: Fairfax County Public Schools begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 25, 2025 and ends June 17, 2026 — one of the later end dates among Virginia's large districts. Spring Break runs March 30–April 3, 2026, aligned with Prince William County.
